top_signals.title: Iamgold boosts contained gold at Ontario’s Côté mine
top_signals.summary: Measured and indicated resources now total 838 million tonnes grading 0.75 gram gold per tonne for contained metal of 20.34 million oz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Mercedes-AMG Launches GT Luxury Performance EV
top_signals.summary: Michael Schiebe, head of Mercedes-AMG, discusses the automaker’s new GT 4-door coupe and the market for luxury electric vehicles as the company prepares to launch more than 27 new electric and combustion engine vehicles in the next 36 months. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Aluminum’s US comeback hinges on power, not tariffs, industry advocates say
top_signals.summary: Century Aluminum’s proposed smelter in Oklahoma remains dependent on securing a long-term electricity agreement.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Cameco pays $83M to boost Cigar Lake ownership
top_signals.summary: Upon closing, Cameco's ownership of the mine will rise to 57.418%.
